iaido_draw.name: Iaido Draw
iaido_draw.description: Setup/Builder: A lightning-fast draw from the scabbard. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Bushido Pip.

meditative_stance.name: Meditative Stance
meditative_stance.description: Setup: Prepare your mind for the perfect strike. Generates 1 Bushido Pip and applies [Focused].

hissatsu_chidori.name: Hissatsu: Chidori
hissatsu_chidori.description: Payoff: A devastating pierce of a thousand strikes. Consumes 5 Bushido Pips to deal massive Physical damage.

tsubame_gaeshi.name: Tsubame Gaeshi
tsubame_gaeshi.description: Payoff: A recursive strike that hits twice. Consumes 3 Bushido Pips to strike the target and any nearby enemy.

sever_spirit.name: Sever Spirit
sever_spirit.description: Defense/Disruption: Strike at the opponent's will. Reduces target's Concentration and applies [Dazed] for 4 ticks.

dragons_breath.name: Dragon's Breath
dragons_breath.description: Defense/Counters: Parry an incoming strike and counter with a flash of your blade. Reduces next hit by 50%.

shadow_dash.name: Shadow Dash
shadow_dash.description: Mobility: Blink through the battlefield with a blur of steel.

way_of_the_warrior.name: Way of the Warrior
way_of_the_warrior.description: Utility/Signature: Enter a trance of supreme martial focus. All Bushido spenders cost 50% less for 10 ticks.

samurai_physiology.name: Samurai Physiology
samurai_physiology.description: Passive: Single Blade Style. You gain 10% critical chance and 20% critical damage when using a single-handed weapon with an empty off-hand.
